Record Class MouseEvent.MouseClickedEvent

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.event.input.MouseEvent.MouseClickedEvent
Record Components:
button - the mouse button that was clicked
stage - the stage on which the mouse button was clicked
x - the X coordinate on which the mouse button was clicked
y - the Y coordinate on which the mouse button was clicked
All Implemented Interfaces:
Event, InputEvent, MouseEvent, MouseEvent.MouseButtonEvent
Enclosing interface:
MouseEvent
public static record MouseEvent.MouseClickedEvent(@NonNull MouseButton button, @NonNull Stage stage, double x, double y) extends Record implements MouseEvent.MouseButtonEvent
This event is fired when a mouse button was clicked on a stage, i.e. pressed and quickly released.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface MouseEvent

    MouseEvent.MouseButtonEvent, MouseEvent.MouseClickedEvent, MouseEvent.MouseCursorMovedEvent, MouseEvent.MousePressedEvent, MouseEvent.MouseReleasedEvent, MouseEvent.MouseScrolledEvent

    • MouseClickedEvent

      public MouseClickedEvent(@NonNull @NonNull MouseButton button, @NonNull @NonNull Stage stage, double x, double y)
      Creates an instance of a MouseClickedEvent record class.
      Parameters:
      button - the value for the button record component
      stage - the value for the stage record component
      x - the value for the x record component
      y - the value for the y record component

  • Method Details

    • isPressed

      public boolean isPressed()
      Determines whether the mouse button was pressed at the moment when this event was fired.
      Specified by:
      isPressed in interface MouseEvent.MouseButtonEvent
      Returns:
      true if the button is pressed, false otherwise

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
